title: Parliament LIVE: ‘Right thing to do’, says Jaishankar on granting Iranian ship docking permission in Kochi
description: Parliament Session Today: The second part of the Parliament's Budget Session begins on Monday, 9 March, with Lok Sabha set to debate the removal of Speaker Om Birla, and EAM S Jaishankar expected to issue a statement on the Iran-US-Israel conflict. Follow LIVE updates here.
